Handle 0x0048, DMI type 17, 40 bytes
Memory Device
	Array Handle: 0x0046
	Error Information Handle: Not Available
	Total Width: 72 bits
	Data Width: 64 bits
	Size: 16 GB
	Form Factor: DIMM
	Set: None
	Locator: DIMM0
	Bank Locator: P0_Node0_Channel0_Dimm0
	Type: DDR4
	Type Detail: Synchronous
	Speed: 3200 MT/s
	Manufacturer: Samsung
	Serial Number: 0x12345678
	Asset Tag: 0x12345678
	Part Number: M393A8G40AB2-CWE
	Rank: 2
	Configured Memory Speed: 2933 MT/s
	Minimum Voltage: 1.2 V
	Maximum Voltage: 1.2 V
	Configured Voltage: 1.2 V

Handle 0x004C, DMI type 17, 40 bytes
Memory Device
	Array Handle: 0x0046
	Error Information Handle: Not Available
	Total Width: 72 bits
	Data Width: 64 bits
	Size: No Module Installed
	Form Factor: DIMM
	Set: None
	Locator: DIMM2
